purpose: T1/T1b/T4/T5: re-extract all hydraulic and thermal closures from mesh-true PCA centerlines; fix probe-CSV orientation bug; implement momentum-budget friction decomposition.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin mainline continuations (t=7915 s). T1=geometry fix, T1b=momentum budget, T4=downcomer thermal, T5=all-span recirculation/Ri. Scaling study deferred.

key_findings.geometry: Heater/cooler inclined 21.5 deg (not vertical); test-section bore 20.9 mm vs 22.1 mm elsewhere; probe-CSV swapped lower<->right.
key_findings.momentum_budget: De-buoyed f/f_lam per leg: heater ~2.7, downcomer ~1.0-1.3, upcomer ~2.0-2.7, cooler ~1.5-2.0.
key_findings.downcomer_thermal: HTC ~43-44 W/m2K, UA' ~3.0, Nu ~1.74-1.76 (stable passive parasitic).
key_findings.upcomer_recirculation: Backflow 0.19-0.34 EXCLUSIVE to upcomer (left leg); heater/downcomer/cooler zero.

open_questions_for_user: Confirm loop-closure energy check (optional T1b capstone): sum friction losses vs buoyancy head.
